mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, user_id, account_id, nickname, avatar_media_id, user_status, searchable
mapper.select: select from users where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from users where user_id = #{userId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from users
order by id desc

select from users
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into users (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, user_id, account_id, nickname, avatar_media_id, user_status, searchable) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{userId}, #{accountId}, #{nickname}, #{avatarMediaId}, #{userStatus}, #{searchable})

insert into users (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, user_id, account_id, nickname, avatar_media_id, user_status, searchable) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.userId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.avatarMediaId}, #{item.userStatus}, #{item.searchable})
mapper.update: update users set account_id = #{accountId}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_media_id = #{avatarMediaId}, user_status = #{userStatus}, searchable = #{searchable}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update users set account_id = #{accountId}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_media_id = #{avatarMediaId}, user_status = #{userStatus}, searchable = #{searchable}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where user_id = #{userId}

update.foreach: update users set account_id = #{item.accountId}, nickname = #{item.nickname}, avatar_media_id = #{item.avatarMediaId}, user_status = #{item.userStatus}, searchable = #{item.searchable}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where user_id = #{item.userId}
